line 210: Couldn't resolve reference to 'ACC_INPUT_PC1'.: AGREE expression references non-existent AADL feature 'ACC_INPUT_PC1' in implementation scope -> Replace 'ACCELERO.IMPL.ACC_INPUT_PC1.acc_in_data_x' with 'acc_in_data_x'

line 211: Couldn't resolve reference to 'IMPL'.: AGREE expression references non-existent AADL feature 'IMPL' in implementation scope -> Remove 'ACCELERO.IMPL.' prefix from expression

named thing must be an expression with a type: AGREE expressions reference port names without proper variable declarations or bindings -> Replace port references with valid AGREE expressions using visible identifiers or remove invalid clauses
